revision.text:
{{infobox deity| member_of= {{ill|17 spirits of the world|simple|User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|ja|十七世神|fr|User:Immanuelle/17 esprits du monde}} | type = Shinto | children = | father = | consort = | mother = }} {{ill|{{PAGENAME}}|ja}} is one of the {{ill|17 spirits of the world|simple|User:Immanuelle/17 spirits of the world|ja|十七世神|fr|User:Immanuelle/17 esprits du monde}}. This is a group of Japanese deities ({{ill|Kunitsukami|en}}) that are all in a genealogical relationship descending from {{ill|Susanoo|ja|建速須佐之男命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto}}.
== Overview of the Generations == {{ill|Susanoo|ja|建速須佐之男命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto}} married {{ill|Kushinadahime|ja|櫛名田比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kushinadahime}} (daughter of [[Ashinazuchi and Tenazuchi]]) and had {{ill|Yashimajinumi|ja|八島士奴美神|en}}<ref name="auto">{{Cite web|title=Encyclopedia of Shinto - Home : Kami in Classic Texts : Yashimajinumi|url=http://eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp/modules/xwords/entry.php?entryID=181|website=eos.kokugakuin.ac.jp}}</ref>.
This god married {{Interlanguage link|Konohanachiruhime|ja|木花知流比売|en}}<ref name="auto"> (daughter of {{ill|Ōyamatsumi no Kami|ja|大山津見神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi no Kami}}) and had {{ill|Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|ja|布波能母遅久奴須奴神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami}}.
This god married {{ill|Hikawahime|ja|日河比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|fr}} (daughter of {{ill|Kuraokami|ja|淤加美神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kuraokami|en}}) and had {{ill|Fukafuchi no Mizuyarehana Kami|ja|深淵之水夜礼花神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fukafuchi no Mizuyarehana Kami}}.
This god married {{ill|Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami|ja|天之都度閇知泥神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanotsutobetsuneru Kami}} and had {{ill|Omizunu|ja|淤美豆奴神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Omizunu|en}}.
This god married {{ill|Futemimi|ja|布帝耳神|fr|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi}} (daughter of {{ill|Funodomuno Kami|ja|布怒豆怒神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Funodomuno Kami}}) and had {{ill|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|ja|天之冬衣神}}<ref>Philippi, Donald L. (2015). ''Kojiki''. Princeton University Press. p. 92.</ref><ref>Chamberlain (1882). [http://sacred-texts.com/shi/kj/kj027.htm Section XX.—The August Ancestors of the Deity-Master-Of-The-Great Land.]</ref>. (daughter of {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|ja|大山津見神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi no Kami}}) and had {{ill|Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami|ja|布波能母遅久奴須奴神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fuwanomochikunusunu Kami}}.
This god married {{ill|Hikawahime|ja|日河比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hikawahime|fr}} (daughter of {{ill|Kuraokami|ja|淤加美神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kuraokami|en}}) and had {{ill|Fukafuchi no Mizuyarehana Kami|ja|深淵之水夜礼花神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Fukafuchi no Mizuyarehana Kami}}.
This god married {{ill|Ame-no-Tsudoechine|ja|天之都度閇知泥神|en|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tsudoechine}} and had {{ill|Omizunu|ja|淤美豆奴神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Omizunu|en}}.
This god married {{ill|Futemimi|ja|布帝耳神|fr|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Futemimi}} (daughter of {{ill|Funozuno|ja|布怒豆怒神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Funozuno}}) and had {{ill|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|ja|天之冬衣神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Fuyukinu|en}}<ref>Philippi, Donald L. (2015). ''Kojiki''. Princeton University Press. p. 92.</ref><ref>Chamberlain (1882). [http://sacred-texts.com/shi/kj/kj027.htm Section XX.—The August Ancestors of the Deity-Master-Of-The-Great Land.]</ref>. (This Amanofuyuorihime Kami is also known as Amanofukine Kami{{Sfn|Kondo Toshitaka|1993}}, and is said to be the child of Takehaya Susanoo no Mikoto {{ill|Hinomisaki Shrine|ja|日御崎神社社伝。}}. The child {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto}} is the ancestor of the {{ill|Ono Family (Shrine)|ja|小野氏 (社家)|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ono Family (Shrine)}} who were priests of {{ill|Hinomisaki Shrine|ja|日御崎神社社伝。}}{{Sfn|Kondo Toshitaka|1993}}.)
This god married {{ill|Sashikuni Wakahime|ja|刺国若比売|en:draft||simple|User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Wakahime}} (daughter of {{ill|Sashikuni Ōkami|ja|刺国大神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sashikuni Ōkami|fr}}) and had {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大国主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi no Kami}} (Ōnamuchi no Kami. Half-sibling to the {{ill|Yaso Gods|ja|八十神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yaso Gods}}).
This god married {{ill|Tottori Kami|ja|鳥取神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tottori Kami}} (daughter of {{ill|Yashimamochinogami|ja|八島牟遅能神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yashimamochinogami}}) and had {{ill|Torinarumi Kami|ja|鳥鳴海神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Torinarumi Kami}}.
This god married {{ill|Hinaterunakatanomichioikochini Kami|ja|日名照額田毘道男伊許知邇神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinaterunakatanomichioikochini Kami}} and had {{ill|Kunishirotomi Kami|ja|国忍富神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kunishirotomi Kami}}.
This god married {{ill|Ashinataka Kami|ja|葦那陀迦神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ashinataka Kami}} and had {{ill|Hayamike no Takekasayanosunumi Kami|ja|速甕之多気佐波夜遅奴美神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hayamike no Takekasayanosunumi Kami}}.
This god married {{ill|Sakitamahime|ja|前玉比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sakitamahime}} (daughter of {{ill|Amanomikemunushi no Kami|ja|天之甕主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanomikemunushi no Kami}}) and had {{ill|Mikemunushi no Hiko Kami|ja|甕主日子神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mikemunushi no Hiko Kami}}.
This god married {{ill|Hinarashibime|ja|比那良志毘売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hinarashibime}} (daughter of {{ill|Kuraokami|ja|淤加美神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kuraokami|en}}) and had {{ill|Tahirikishimarumi Kami|ja|多比理岐志麻流美神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Tahirikishimarumi Kami}}.
This god married {{ill|Ikutamatakitamahime Kami|ja|活玉前玉比売神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ikutamatakitamahime Kami}} (daughter of {{ill|Hihiraginosonohanamadomi Kami|ja|比比羅木之其花麻豆美神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Hihiraginosonohanamadomi Kami}}) and had {{ill|Mironami Kami|ja|美呂浪神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Mironami Kami}}.
This god married {{ill|Aonumamashinomaouhime|ja|青沼馬沼押比売|simple|User:Immanuelle/Aonumamashinomaouhime}} (daughter of {{ill|Shikiyamanushi no Kami|ja|敷山主神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Shikiyamanushi no Kami}}) and had {{ill|Nunototomi Torinarumi Kami|ja|布忍富鳥鳴海神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Nunototomi Torinarumi Kami}}.
This god married {{ill|Wakatsukime Kami|ja|若尽女神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Wakatsukime Kami}} and had {{ill|Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami|ja|天日腹大科度美神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanohibarudaisakanodomi Kami}}.
This god married {{ill|Totsumatone Kami|ja|遠津待根神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Totsumatone Kami}} (daughter of {{ill|Amanosagiri Kami|ja|天之狭霧神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Amanosagiri Kami}}) and had {{ill|Totsuyamisakitara Kami|ja|遠津山岬多良斯神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Totsuyamisakitara Kami}}.
== Family Tree == {{Eight generations of Izumo}}
==References== {{reflist}} {{draft categories| {{ill|Category:17 spirits of the world|ja|Category:十七世神|fr|Category:17 esprits du monde}} [[Category:Kunitsukami]] }}

revision.comment: Replaced content with "The {{nihongo|Ono family|小野氏[[ja:小野氏_(社家)]]}} are the priests of [[Hinomisaki Shrine]]."
revision.text: The {{nihongo|Ono family|小野氏[[ja:小野氏_(社家)]]}} are the priests of [[Hinomisaki Shrine]].

The {{nihongo|Ono family|小野氏[[ja:小野氏_(社家)]]}} are the priests of [[Hinomisaki Shrine]]. They descend from {{ill|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|ja|天之冬衣神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Fuyukinu|en}} and often intermarried with the [[Izumo clan]]

The {{nihongo|Ono family|小野氏[[ja:小野氏_(社家)]]}} are the priests of [[Hinomisaki Shrine]]. They descend from {{ill|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|lt=Ame-no-Fuyukinu's|ja|天之冬衣神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Fuyukinu|en}} son {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto}} brother of [[Ōkuninushi]] and often intermarried with the [[Izumo clan]].

The {{nihongo|Ono family|小野氏[[ja:小野氏_(社家)]]}} are the priests of [[Hinomisaki Shrine]]. They descend from {{ill|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|lt=Ame-no-Fuyukinu's|ja|天之冬衣神|simple|User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Fuyukinu|en}} son {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto}} brother of [[Ōkuninushi]] and often intermarried with the [[Izumo clan]]. <ref>[[:ja:小野尊光|Takamitsu Ono]]『小野家譜』(Histoire de la famille Ono)（{{ill|Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|en}}, 1875）</ref>

The {{nihongo|Ono family|小野氏}} are the priests of [[Hinomisaki Shrine]]. They descend from [[:en:Ame-no-Fuyukinu|Ame-no-Fuyukinu's]] son {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135491392}} brother of [[Ōkuninushi]] and often intermarried with the [[Izumo clan]]. <ref>[[:ja:小野尊光|Takamitsu Ono]]『小野家譜』(Histoire de la famille Ono)（{{ill|Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|qq=}}, 1875）</ref>

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小野氏 (社家)]]
[[ja:小野氏 (社家)]]
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none)
Wikidata name: (none)
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none)
Wikidata name: (none)
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:48, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
The {{nihongo|Ono family|小野氏}} are the priests of [[Hinomisaki Shrine]]. They descend from [[:en:Ame-no-Fuyukinu|Ame-no-Fuyukinu's]] son {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491392}} brother of [[Ōkuninushi]] and often intermarried with the [[Izumo clan]]. <ref>[[:ja:小野尊光|Takamitsu Ono]]『小野家譜』(Histoire de la famille Ono)（{{ill|Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|qq=}}, 1875）</ref>

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小野氏 (社家)]]
[[ja:小野氏 (社家)]]
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none)
Wikidata name: (none)
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none)
Wikidata name: (none)
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:48, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
The {{nihongo|Ono family|小野氏}} are the priests of [[Hinomisaki Shrine]]. They descend from [[:en:Ame-no-Fuyukinu|Ame-no-Fuyukinu's]] son {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491392}} brother of [[Ōkuninushi]] and often intermarried with the [[Izumo clan]]. <ref>[[:ja:小野尊光|Takamitsu Ono]]『小野家譜』(Histoire de la famille Ono)（{{ill|Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|qq=}}, 1875）</ref>

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小野氏 (社家)]]
[[ja:小野氏 (社家)]]
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none)
Wikidata name: (none)
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none)
Wikidata name: (none)
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:48, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
The {{nihongo|Ono family|小野氏}} are the priests of [[Hinomisaki Shrine]]. They descend from [[:en:Ame-no-Fuyukinu|Ame-no-Fuyukinu's]] son {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491392}} brother of [[Ōkuninushi]] and often intermarried with the [[Izumo clan]]. <ref>[[:ja:小野尊光|Takamitsu Ono]]『小野家譜』(Histoire de la famille Ono)（{{ill|Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|qq=}}, 1875）</ref>

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none)
Wikidata name: (none)
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:48, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
The {{nihongo|Ono family|小野氏}} are the priests of [[Hinomisaki Shrine]]. They descend from [[:en:Ame-no-Fuyukinu|Ame-no-Fuyukinu's]] son {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491392}} brother of [[Ōkuninushi]] and often intermarried with the [[Izumo clan]]. <ref>[[:ja:小野尊光|Takamitsu Ono]]『小野家譜』(Histoire de la famille Ono)（{{ill|Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|qq=}}, 1875）</ref>
==Family Tree==

The {{nihongo|Ono family|小野氏}} are the priests of [[Hinomisaki Shrine]]. They descend from [[:en:Ame-no-Fuyukinu|Ame-no-Fuyukinu's]] son {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491392}} brother of [[Ōkuninushi]] and often intermarried with the [[Izumo clan]]. <ref>[[:ja:小野尊光|Takamitsu Ono]]『小野家譜』(Histoire de la famille Ono)（{{ill|Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|qq=}}, 1875）</ref>

The {{nihongo|Ono family|小野氏}} are the priests of [[Hinomisaki Shrine]]. They descend from [[:en:Ame-no-Fuyukinu|Ame-no-Fuyukinu's]] son {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491392}} brother of [[Ōkuninushi]] and often intermarried with the [[Izumo clan]]. <ref>[[:ja:小野尊光|Takamitsu Ono]]『小野家譜』(Histoire de la famille Ono)（{{ill|Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|qq=}}, 1875）</ref>

The {{nihongo|Ono family|小野氏}} are the priests of [[Hinomisaki Shrine]]. They descend from [[:en:Ame-no-Fuyukinu|Ame-no-Fuyukinu's]] son {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491392}} brother of [[Ōkuninushi]] and often intermarried with the [[Izumo clan]]. <ref>[[:ja:小野尊光|Takamitsu Ono]]『小野家譜』(Histoire de la famille Ono)（{{ill|Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|qq=}}, 1875）</ref>

The {{nihongo|Ono family|小野氏}} are the priests of [[Hinomisaki Shrine]]. They descend from [[:en:Ame-no-Fuyukinu|Ame-no-Fuyukinu's]] son {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491392}} brother of [[Ōkuninushi]] and often intermarried with the [[Izumo clan]]. <ref>[[:ja:小野尊光|Takamitsu Ono]]『小野家譜』(Histoire de la famille Ono)（{{ill|Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|qq=}}, 1875）</ref>

The {{nihongo|Ono family|小野氏}} are the priests of [[Hinomisaki Shrine]]. They descend from [[:en:Ame-no-Fuyukinu|Ame-no-Fuyukinu's]] son {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491392}} brother of [[Ōkuninushi]] and often intermarried with the [[Izumo clan]]. <ref>[[:ja:小野尊光|Takamitsu Ono]]『小野家譜』(Histoire de la famille Ono)（{{ill|Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|qq=}}, 1875）</ref>

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none)
Wikidata name: (none)
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:48, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
The {{nihongo|Ono family|小野氏}} are the priests of [[Hinomisaki Shrine]]. They descend from [[:en:Ame-no-Fuyukinu|Ame-no-Fuyukinu's]] son {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491392}} brother of [[Ōkuninushi]] and often intermarried with the [[Izumo clan]]. <ref>[[:ja:小野尊光|Takamitsu Ono]]『小野家譜』(Histoire de la famille Ono)（{{ill|Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|qq=}}, 1875）</ref>

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none)
Wikidata name: (none)
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none)
Wikidata name: (none)
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:48, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
The {{nihongo|Ono family|小野氏}} are the priests of [[Hinomisaki Shrine]]. They descend from [[:en:Ame-no-Fuyukinu|Ame-no-Fuyukinu's]] son {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491392}} brother of [[Ōkuninushi]] and often intermarried with the [[Izumo clan]]. <ref>[[:ja:小野尊光|Takamitsu Ono]]『小野家譜』(Histoire de la famille Ono)（{{ill|Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|qq=}}, 1875）</ref>

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none)
Wikidata name: (none)
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none)
Wikidata name: (none)
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:48, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
The {{nihongo|Ono family|小野氏}} are the priests of [[Hinomisaki Shrine]]. They descend from [[:en:Ame-no-Fuyukinu|Ame-no-Fuyukinu's]] son {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491392}} brother of [[Ōkuninushi]] and often intermarried with the [[Izumo clan]]. <ref>[[:ja:小野尊光|Takamitsu Ono]]『小野家譜』(Histoire de la famille Ono)（{{ill|Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|qq=}}, 1875）</ref>

[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none)
Wikidata name: (none)
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:48, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
The {{nihongo|Ono family|小野氏}} are the priests of [[Hinomisaki Shrine]]. They descend from [[:en:Ame-no-Fuyukinu|Ame-no-Fuyukinu's]] son {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491392}} brother of [[Ōkuninushi]] and often intermarried with the [[Izumo clan]]. <ref>[[:ja:小野尊光|Takamitsu Ono]]『小野家譜』(Histoire de la famille Ono)（{{ill|Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|qq=}}, 1875）</ref>

The {{nihongo|Ono family|小野氏}} are the priests of [[Hinomisaki Shrine]]. They descend from [[:en:Ame-no-Fuyukinu|Ame-no-Fuyukinu's]] son {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491392}} brother of [[Ōkuninushi]] and often intermarried with the [[Izumo clan]]. <ref>[[:ja:小野尊光|Takamitsu Ono]]『小野家譜』(Histoire de la famille Ono)（{{ill|Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|qq=}}, 1875）</ref>

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none)
Wikidata name: (none)
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:24, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none)
Wikidata name: (none)
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:48, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
The {{nihongo|Ono family|小野氏}} are the priests of [[Hinomisaki Shrine]]. They descend from {{ill|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|en|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|WD=Q48744862|lt=Ame-no-Fuyukinu's}} son {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491392}} brother of [[Ōkuninushi]] and often intermarried with the [[Izumo clan]]. <ref>[[:ja:小野尊光|Takamitsu Ono]]『小野家譜』(Histoire de la famille Ono)（{{ill|Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|qq=}}, 1875）</ref>

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小野氏 (社家)]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小野氏 (社家)]]
[[ja:小野氏 (社家)]]


The {{nihongo|Ono family|小野氏}} are the priests of [[Hinomisaki Shrine]]. They descend from {{ill|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|en|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|WD=Q48744862|lt=Ame-no-Fuyukinu's}} son {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491392}} brother of [[Ōkuninushi]] and often intermarried with the [[Izumo clan]]. <ref>[[:ja:小野尊光|Takamitsu Ono]]『小野家譜』(Histoire de la famille Ono)（{{ill|Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|qq=}}, 1875）</ref>

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小野氏 (社家)]]
[[ja:小野氏 (社家)]]


The {{nihongo|Ono family|小野氏}} are the priests of [[Hinomisaki Shrine]]. They descend from {{ill|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|en|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|WD=Q48744862|lt=Ame-no-Fuyukinu's}} son {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491392}} brother of [[Ōkuninushi]] and often intermarried with the [[Izumo clan]]. <ref>[[:ja:小野尊光|Takamitsu Ono]]『小野家譜』(Histoire de la famille Ono)（{{ill|Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|qq=}}, 1875）</ref>

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小野氏 (社家)]]
[[ja:小野氏 (社家)]]


The {{nihongo|Ono family|小野氏}} are the priests of [[Hinomisaki Shrine]]. They descend from {{ill|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|en|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|WD=Q48744862|lt=Ame-no-Fuyukinu's}} son {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491392}} brother of [[Ōkuninushi]] and often intermarried with the [[Izumo clan]]. <ref>[[:ja:小野尊光|Takamitsu Ono]]『小野家譜』(Histoire de la famille Ono)（{{ill|Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|qq=}}, 1875）</ref>

The {{nihongo|Ono family|小野氏}} are the priests of [[Hinomisaki Shrine]]. They descend from {{ill|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|en|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|WD=Q48744862|lt=Ame-no-Fuyukinu's|1=Ame-no-Fuyukinu}} son {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491392|1=Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto}} brother of [[Ōkuninushi]] and often intermarried with the [[Izumo clan]]. <ref>[[:ja:小野尊光|Takamitsu Ono]]『小野家譜』(Histoire de la famille Ono)（{{ill|Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|qq=}}, 1875）</ref>

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:小野氏 (社家)]]
[[ja:小野氏 (社家)]]


The {{nihongo|Ono family|小野氏}} are the priests of [[Hinomisaki Shrine]]. They descend from {{ill|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|en|Ame-no-Fuyukinu|WD=Q48744862|lt=Ame-no-Fuyukinu's|1=Ame-no-Fuyukinu}} son {{ill|Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja|清武豊彦命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|WD=Q135491392|1=Kiyotake Toyohiko no Mikoto}} brother of [[Ōkuninushi]] and often intermarried with the [[Izumo clan]]. <ref>[[:ja:小野尊光|Takamitsu Ono]]『小野家譜』(Histoire de la famille Ono)（{{ill|Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Historiographical Institute of the University of Tokyo|qq=}}, 1875）</ref>
